blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,200 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 2.0" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
